title: haplopappus croceus var. genuflexus
intro: Haplopappus croceus var. genuflexus, also known as Yellow Rabbitbrush, is a flowering plant native to the western regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of essential oils, particularly limonene. The plant's health benefits include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Haplopappus croceus var. genuflexus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
